purpose: Pure, side-effect-free codec for Contact Card Format v1: binary encode/decode, NIP-01 kind-0 signature construction and verification, base64url transport encoding, and the single canonical parseContactCard seam consumed by every npub entry point in the epic (AddContactModal, QR scanner, group invite, /add deep-link page).

public_api.name: CARD_CONTENT
public_api.description: The one canonical signed-content builder = JSON.stringify({name}). Shared by encodeCard and decodeCard so signature construction and verification can never diverge (AC-SIG-5).

public_api.name: encodeCard
public_api.signature: encodeCard(pubkeyHex: string, profile: { nickname: string; createdAt: number }, signEvent: EventSigner['signEvent']): Promise<string>
public_api.description: Builds and signs a kind-0 event for the card content, packs the binary layout, returns a base64url payload. Empty nickname emits an UNSIGNED (pubkey-only) card (AC-CARD-6). Non-empty nickname is UTF-8-round-trip-normalized then truncated to MAX_NAME_BYTES on a codepoint boundary before signing (AC-CARD-5, AC-SIG-5).

public_api.name: buildShareUrl
public_api.description: Wraps a base64url card payload in the fixed onboarding URL https://few.chat/add#c=<payload> (DD 9 — hash fragment, never transmitted to the server). Consumed by S6's share action.

public_api.name: decodeCard
public_api.signature: decodeCard(b64url: string): { version: 0; pubkeyHex: string; profile?: { nickname: string; createdAt: number } } | { error: string }
public_api.description: Strict v1 parser: rejects version>0, HAS_AVATAR set, any reserved bit set, or a payload length inconsistent with name_len (AC-CARD-2/3). For signed cards, reconstructs the kind-0 event, computes id = getEventHash(event), attaches it, then calls verifyEvent (AC-SIG-6) before accepting. Never throws (VQ-S1-006).

public_api.name: parseContactCard
public_api.signature: parseContactCard(input: string): { pubkeyHex: string } | { pubkeyHex: string; profile: { nickname: string; updatedAt: string } } | { error: string }
public_api.description: The single decode seam. Discriminates bare npub (via npubToPubkeyHex, no profile) vs a card link (extracts the #c= fragment) vs a raw base64url payload, then delegates to decodeCard. Maps decoded createdAt to an ISO-8601 updatedAt string for the contactCache LWW comparison consumed by S2/S4/S5/S7. Never throws (AC-PARSE-5).

public_api.name: bytesToBase64Url
public_api.description: Pure base64url (RFC 4648 §5, no padding) encoder — no existing helper in the codebase, added per exploration.json gap.

public_api.name: base64UrlToBytes
public_api.description: Pure base64url decoder; returns null (never throws) for invalid-alphabet or invalid-length input.

public_api.name: SIGNED_CARD_FIXED_OVERHEAD_BYTES
public_api.description: Fixed byte overhead of a signed card excluding the name (header+pubkey+created_at+name_len+sig), for AC-CARD-4 length-bound tests and future share-modal QR sizing.

owned_data: The Contact Card Format v1 binary layout and its base64url transport encoding — owned exclusively by this module; no other module packs or unpacks card bytes.
